project.title: rhGAA ADA epitopes determination
project.projectDescription: Here, we have determined rhGAA ADA epitopes in the plasma samples of Pompe disease patients using series of affinity purifications combined with epitope extraction and label free quantitation LC-MS methodology
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Workflow includes pulldown of ADAs with immobilized drug, elution of bound ADAs with the drug digest, pulldown of peptide-ADAs complexes and detection of the bound to ADA rhGAA peptides.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Differential label free quantitation data analysis using Quant MS1 module of the FragPipe v19.1 was used to identify ADA-bound rhGAA peptides.

Characteristics[Bait]: rhGAA protein covalently immobilized on agarose beads.
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: affinity purification of the anti-rhGAA ADAs using rhGAA protein covalently immobilized on agarose beads.
Comment[Instrument]: Orbitrap QE+ coupled to an Evosep One UPLC system.
Comment[FragmentationMethod]: normalized higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) energy of 28
